use_cases: Animated text reveals on landing page hero sections
Scroll-triggered content sections for storytelling layouts
Progressive text disclosure for feature highlights and testimonials
Portfolio or case study presentations with dramatic text reveals
ai_summary: A GSAP-powered text block animation component that uses SplitText and ScrollTrigger to reveal text content line-by-line with a sliding color block effect. The animation is triggered on scroll and fully customizable via props including color, timing, and delay. Ideal for creating engaging, animated typography experiences on any content-heavy web pages.
